# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-apispecification.html): The machine-readable definition and configuration of the API surface area. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DocumentationPortal Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentationportal.html): The frontend presentation and content layer for the API documentation site. Architectural overview of the DocumentationPortal domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [TechnicalGuides Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-technicalguides.html): Specific functional documentation covering complex operational patterns like security and polling. Architectural overview of the TechnicalGuides domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
